hooks.command: bash -c 'f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty") 2>/dev/null || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE "\\.(ts|tsx)$" || exit 0; out=$(npm run typecheck 2>&1); rc=$?; [ $rc -ne 0 ] && echo "[typecheck] $out" | head -30; [ -f node_modules/.bin/eslint ] && { out2=$(npm run lint 2>&1); rc2=$?; [ $rc2 -ne 0 ] && echo "[lint] $out2" | head -30; } || echo "[lint] eslint not installed (run after RN init)"; exit 0'
